2605.12988.title: Retrieval-Augmented Tutoring for Algorithm Tracing and Problem-Solving in AI Education
2605.12988.paper_summary: Students learning algorithms often need support as they interpret traces, debug reasoning errors, and apply procedures across unfamiliar problem instances. In this paper, we present KITE (Knowledge-Informed Tutoring Engine), a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)-based intelligent tutoring system designed to serve as a classroom teaching assistant for algorithmic reasoning and problem-solving tasks. KITE uses an intent-aware Socratic response strategy to tailor support to different student needs, responding with targeted hints, guiding questions, and progressive scaffolding intended to strengthen students' algorithmic problem-solving ability. To keep responses aligned with course content, KITE uses a multimodal RAG pipeline that retrieves relevant information from course materials. We evaluate KITE using three forms of assessment: RAGAs-based metrics for response grounding and quality, expert evaluation of pedagogical quality, and a simulated student pipeline in which a weaker language model interacts with KITE across two-turn dialogues and produces revised answers after receiving feedback. Results indicate that KITE produces contextually grounded and pedagogically appropriate responses. Further, using simulated students, KITE's feedback helped the student models produce more accurate follow-up responses on procedural and tracing questions, suggesting that its scaffolding can support algorithmic problem-solving. This work contributes a tutoring architecture and an evaluation approach for assessing retrieval-grounded explanations and scaffolded problem-solving feedback.
2605.12988.paper_summary_zh: 學生在學習算法時，常常需要支持，以便他們能夠解釋痕跡、調試推理錯誤，並在不熟悉的問題實例中應用程序。在本文中，我們介紹了 KITE（知識驅動輔導引擎），這是一個基於檢索增強生成（RAG）的智能輔導系統，旨在作為算法推理和問題解決任務的課堂教學助手。KITE 使用意圖感知的蘇格拉底回應策略，根據不同學生的需求量身定制支持，通過針對性的提示、引導性問題和漸進式支架來回應，旨在加強學生的算法問題解決能力。為了使回應與課程內容保持一致，KITE 使用多模態 RAG 管道，從課程材料中檢索相關信息。我們使用三種評估形式來評估 KITE：基於 RAGAs 的回應基礎和質量指標、專家對教學質量的評估，以及一個模擬學生管道，在該管道中，較弱的語言模型與 KITE 進行兩輪對話並在收到反饋後產生修訂答案。結果表明，KITE 產生了具有上下文基礎和教學適當性的回應。此外，使用模擬學生，KITE 的反饋幫助學生模型在程序性和追蹤問題上產生了更準確的後續回應，這表明其支架可以支持算法問題解決。本研究貢獻了一種輔導架構和一種評估方法，用於評估基於檢索的解釋和支架問題解決反饋。
2605.12988.author: Mragisha Jain et.al.
2605.12988.authors: Mragisha Jain, Tirth Bhatt, Griffin Pitts, Aum Pandya, Peter Brusilovsky, Narges Norouzi, Arto Hellas, Juho Leinonen, Bita Akram
